title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, create, and run large language models locally with a single command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models from any Python script.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same feature parity as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama endpoints as LLM, chat, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich, open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama with multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG, and user auth.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama providing sync/async APIs, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API, covering chat, generate, pull, and delete operations.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive REPL and CLI wrapper around the Ollama REST API with history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions and chat sidebar.

title: ollama-workflows
summary: GitHub Actions collection to pull, benchmark, and deploy Ollama models in CI pipelines.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and persistent model storage.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes for building local LLM pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Official C# / .NET client library for Ollama with async enumerable streaming and dependency injection helpers.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Streamlit app that performs retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama embeddings and Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Cross-platform Flutter desktop app for chatting with Ollama models, featuring markdown rendering and model switcher.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that streams Ollama responses into guild channels with slash commands and per-user rate limits.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform provider to declaratively manage Ollama models and users on remote instances.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin that adds a local AI assistant block using any Ollama model for summarization and brainstorming.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package download page for the Ollama JavaScript client.

title: ollama PyPI
summary: Official PyPI page for the Ollama Python client.
